2368870.name: Dragon's Doom: A Skyhopper Tale
2368870.description:
Fight - Grow - Survive

Dragon's Doom is a fresh take on the Survivor's genre - as you start as a hatchling dragon, you have one goal: To Survive. The best way to survive? Is to fight, burn and eat your way into growing to a full fledge dragon. The game features action controls, along with multiple stats to maintain and grow - with earning active and passive abilities. Take flight, and burn your enemies villages to the ground!



As the game progresses the pesky Hoppers will build their villages, towers and grow in numbers. You will die. But fear not, another hatchling will always take your place - and you will fight and grow once more.

Each play through brings a new map layout, as well as procedurally generated enemies who build up endless defenses that thwart your flying, ground movement and of course try to slay you!
